creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Marked as MANUAL_PACKAGE_BUILD unlike bug 195800. Not sure about the boundary when a package becomes too big.

  # marked
  $ pkg info katawa-shoujo | fgrep size
  Flat size      : 470MiB

  # not marked
  $ pkg info narcissu2 | fgrep size
  Flat size      : 326MiB
